critical.mandate: Quality gates must be enforced, not advisory

step.title: Detect CI Platform
step.action: Scan for existing CI config files: .github/workflows/, .gitlab-ci.yml, Jenkinsfile, .circleci/config.yml
If config found: note detected platform and present finding to user
If no config found: note that no existing CI platform was detected
step.ask: Which CI platform would you like to use? Options: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI, or other. {If detected: "Detected: {platform} — recommended based on existing config."}

step.title: Define Pipeline
step.action: Build > lint > test > coverage > deploy gates

step.title: Quality Gates
step.action: Define pass/fail thresholds: coverage %, test pass rate

step.title: Generate Pipeline Config
step.action: Generate CI config file (.github/workflows/ci.yml or equivalent)

step.title: Generate Output
step.action: Generate CI pipeline configuration document with quality gates

next-step.primary: Validate implementation readiness before sprint planning
